shellCommands.command: find /home/user/workspace/dst -type f 2>/dev/null | sort; ls -la /home/user/workspace/dst 2>/dev/null || echo "dst/ does not exist yet"
java -version 2>&1; echo "---"; mvn -version 2>&1 || echo "Maven not found"

SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/helloworld-1.0.0.jar &
sleep 3
# Test without name
echo "=== Test 1: no name ==="
curl -s http://localhost:3000/
echo
echo "=== Test 2: with name ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=Alice"
echo
echo "=== Test 3: name with whitespace ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Bob%20%20"
echo
echo "=== Test 4: empty name ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name="
echo
echo "=== Test 5: only spaces ==="
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20%20"
echo
kill %1 2>/dev/null
wait 2>/dev/null
